allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total inline comments: {len\(data\)}'\); [print\(f'\\n--- {c[\\"user\\"][\\"login\\"]} on {c.get\(\\"path\\"\)}:{c.get\(\\"line\\"\) or c.get\(\\"original_line\\"\)} ---\\n{c[\\"body\\"]}'\) for c in data]")
